rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §28.02123, which governs school district notification about Algebra II graduation requirements. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 28.02123. NOTIFICATION OF CERTAIN HIGH SCHOOL GRADUATION REQUIREMENTS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns high school graduation notification, not property tax exemptions.
